description: Add -L flag to curl redirect-following call in install script to properly follow HTTP redirects
diff:
diff --git a/install.sh b/install.sh
index 6e3ce85..fed17c2 100755
--- a/install.sh
+++ b/install.sh
@@ -51,7 +51,7 @@ http_download() {
 http_get_redirect() {
     url=$1
     if command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
-        curl -fsSI -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "$url" 2>/dev/null
+        curl -fsSIL -o /dev/null -w '%{url_effective}' "$url" 2>/dev/null
     elif command -v wget >/dev/null 2>&1; then
         wget -S --spider --max-redirect=0 "$url" 2>&1 | grep -i 'Location:' | sed 's/.*Location: *//' | tr -d '\r'
     else
expected_message: fix(install): add follow-redirect flag to curl in install script

description: Simplify the checksums filename in install script from versioned name to plain checksums.txt
diff:
diff --git a/install.sh b/install.sh
index 89a6fee..fe852c4 100755
--- a/install.sh
+++ b/install.sh
@@ -117,7 +117,7 @@ main() {
         ext="zip"
     fi
     archive="${BINARY}_${version}_${os}_${arch}.${ext}"
-    checksums="${BINARY}_${version}_checksums.txt"
+    checksums="checksums.txt"
 
     tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
     trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT
expected_message: chore(install): simplify checksum filename to match goreleaser output

description: Apply environment variable overrides even when the config file does not exist on disk

description: Update Go version from 1.23.x to 1.24.x in the GitHub Actions release workflow

diff --git a/.github/workflows/release.yml b/.github/workflows/release.yml
index f423bc3..3b5eabb 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/release.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/release.yml
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - uses: actions/setup-go@v6
         with:
-          go-version: "1.23.x"
+          go-version: "1.24.x"
 
       - name: Build cwai
         run: go build -o cwai .
expected_message: ci(release): bump go version to 1.24 in release workflow

-	DefaultModel          = "gpt-4o-mini"
+	DefaultModel          = "gpt-5-mini"

 | `CWAI_API_KEY` | API key (required) | *not set* |

-| `CWAI_MODEL` | Model name | `gpt-4o-mini` |

description: Add scope-must-not-repeat-type rule to JSON schema and system prompt
diff:
diff --git a/internal/ai/schema.go b/internal/ai/schema.go
index 9bf97e2..013b044 100644
--- a/internal/ai/schema.go
+++ b/internal/ai/schema.go
@@ -55,7 +55,7 @@ func BuildResponseFormat() map[string]any {
 					},
 					"scope": map[string]any{
 						"type":        "string",
-						"description": "Exactly ONE word, no spaces. Good: auth, api, db, ui. Bad: 'auth system'.",
+						"description": "Exactly ONE word, no spaces. MUST NOT repeat the commit type. Good: auth, api, db, ui. Bad: 'auth system', 'tests' when type is test, 'docs' when type is docs.",
 					},
 					"description": map[string]any{
 						"type":        "string",
diff --git a/internal/prompt/prompt.go b/internal/prompt/prompt.go
index afd12ac..3f663db 100644
--- a/internal/prompt/prompt.go
+++ b/internal/prompt/prompt.go
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ FORMAT RULES:
    - <specific change 2>
 
 2. Type MUST be one of: feat, fix, refactor, docs, style, test, chore, perf, ci, build
-3. Scope is REQUIRED — short, generalizing word covering ALL changes
+3. Scope is REQUIRED — short, generalizing word covering ALL changes. Scope MUST NOT repeat the type (BAD: test(tests), ci(ci), docs(docs). GOOD: test(auth), ci(github), docs(readme)).
expected_message: refactor(prompt): add scope-must-not-repeat-type rule to schema and prompt

description: Add test, vet, lint, and check targets to Makefile and add go-test pre-commit hook
diff:
diff --git a/Makefile b/Makefile
index 541d197..b3987fe 100644
--- a/Makefile
+++ b/Makefile
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ BINARY := cwai
 VERSION := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "dev")
 LDFLAGS := -s -w -X main.version=$(VERSION)
 
-.PHONY: build install clean
+.PHONY: build install clean test vet lint check
 
 build:
 	go build -ldflags "$(LDFLAGS)" -o $(BINARY) .
@@ -12,3 +12,14 @@ install:
 
 clean:
 	rm -f $(BINARY)
+
+test:
+	go test ./...
+
+vet:
+	go vet ./...
+
+lint:
+	golangci-lint run ./...
+
+check: build vet lint test
diff --git a/.pre-commit-config.yaml b/.pre-commit-config.yaml
index b8c3e33..618d413 100644
--- a/.pre-commit-config.yaml
+++ b/.pre-commit-config.yaml
@@ -15,3 +15,12 @@ repos:
     rev: v2.1.6
     hooks:
       - id: golangci-lint
+
+  - repo: local
+    hooks:
+      - id: go-test
+        name: go test
+        entry: go test ./...
+        language: system
+        pass_filenames: false
+        types: [go]
expected_message: chore(build): add makefile qa targets and go-test pre-commit hook

description: Add pre-commit configuration with yaml, whitespace, shellcheck, and golangci-lint hooks
diff:
diff --git a/.pre-commit-config.yaml b/.pre-commit-config.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b8c3e33
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.pre-commit-config.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+repos:
+  - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks
+    rev: v6.0.0
+    hooks:
+      - id: check-yaml
+      - id: end-of-file-fixer
+      - id: trailing-whitespace
+
+  - repo: https://github.com/shellcheck-py/shellcheck-py
+    rev: v0.10.0.1
+    hooks:
+      - id: shellcheck
+
+  - repo: https://github.com/golangci/golangci-lint
+    rev: v2.1.6
+    hooks:
+      - id: golangci-lint
diff --git a/CONTRIBUTING.md b/CONTRIBUTING.md
index 7b4fa6a..e4f3beb 100644
--- a/CONTRIBUTING.md
+++ b/CONTRIBUTING.md
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ Thanks for your interest in contributing! This document covers everything you ne
 
 - Go 1.23.4+
 - Git
+- [pre-commit](https://pre-commit.com/)
expected_message: ci(precommit): add pre-commit hooks for linting and formatting

description: Add default max output tokens for reasoning and GPT-5 models, expand model family detection, add tests
expected_message: feat(ai): add default max output tokens for reasoning models

description: Refactor release workflow to use env var for secret check and separate step for goreleaser args
diff:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/release.yml b/.github/workflows/release.yml
index deb11c6..f423bc3 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/release.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/release.yml
@@ -12,6 +12,9 @@ jobs:
   release:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
+    env:
+      HAS_CWAI_KEY: ${{ secrets.CWAI_API_KEY != '' }}
+
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v6
         with:
@@ -25,7 +28,7 @@ jobs:
         run: go build -o cwai .
 
       - name: Generate release notes
-        if: ${{ secrets.CWAI_API_KEY != '' }}
+        if: env.HAS_CWAI_KEY == 'true'
         run: |
           TAG=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}
           PREV_TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 "${TAG}^" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
@@ -39,11 +42,18 @@ jobs:
           CWAI_API_URL: ${{ secrets.CWAI_API_URL }}
           CWAI_MODEL: ${{ secrets.CWAI_MODEL }}
 
+      - name: Set goreleaser args
+        id: args
+        run: |
+          if [ "$HAS_CWAI_KEY" = "true" ] && [ -f /tmp/release-notes.md ]; then
+            echo "release_notes=--release-notes /tmp/release-notes.md" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            echo "release_notes=" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
       - uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v7
         with:
           version: latest
-          args: >-
-            release --clean
-            ${{ secrets.CWAI_API_KEY != '' && '--release-notes /tmp/release-notes.md' || '' }}
+          args: release --clean ${{ steps.args.outputs.release_notes }}
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
expected_message: ci(release): refactor secret detection and goreleaser args in release workflow

description: Refactor token estimation to use a more accurate byte-based calculation instead of simple length/4 heuristic
expected_message: refactor(diff): improve token estimation with word and unicode awareness

description: Add unit tests for diff truncation logic covering normal, oversized, and empty diff scenarios
diff:
diff --git a/internal/diff/diff_test.go b/internal/diff/diff_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..abcdef1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/diff/diff_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+package diff
+
+import (
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+)
+
+func TestEstimateTokens(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		name     string
+		input    string
+		expected int
+	}{
+		{"empty string", "", 0},
+		{"short text", "hello world", 2},
+		{"longer text", "this is a somewhat longer piece of text for testing", 12},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
+			result := estimateTokens(tt.input)
+			assert.InDelta(t, tt.expected, result, 5)
+		})
+	}
+}
+
+func TestEstimateTokens_NonASCII(t *testing.T) {
+	result := estimateTokens("hello")
+	resultUnicode := estimateTokens("\u4f60\u597d\u4e16\u754c")
+	assert.Greater(t, resultUnicode, result,
+		"unicode text should estimate more tokens per character")
+}
+
+func TestEstimateTokens_LargeInput(t *testing.T) {
+	var large string
+	for i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {
+		large += "word "
+	}
+	result := estimateTokens(large)
+	assert.Greater(t, result, 500)
+	assert.Less(t, result, 2000)
+}
expected_message: test(diff): add unit tests for token estimation function

description: Use buffered I/O when reading git diff output to reduce memory allocations for large diffs

 }

+++ b/.goreleaser.yaml
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ builds:
       - linux
       - darwin
       - windows
     goarch:
       - amd64
+      - arm64
 
 archives:
   - formats:
@@ -17,6 +18,10 @@ archives:
     format_overrides:
       - goos: windows
         formats:
           - zip
+    name_template: >-
+      {{ .ProjectName }}_{{ .Version }}_{{ .Os }}_{{ .Arch }}
